acquisition method: The mass spectrometer operated in data-dependant acquisition mode
alkylation reagent: alkylation with 5 mM DTT and 15 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 5 mM DTT and 15 mM iodoacetamide
instrument: analyzed with an Orbitrap Exploris 480 (Thermo Scientific) tandem mass spectrometer
labeling: a rapid shotgun proteomics workflow including a 30-min nanoLC-MS/MS measurement
reduction reagent: alkylation with 5 mM DTT and 15 mM iodoacetamide
reduction concentration: alkylation with 5 mM DTT and 15 mM iodoacetamide
